action_set_definitions.name: get_precinct_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current records, total confirmed votes, and verification status for a specific precinct.

action_set_definitions.name: get_discrepancy_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves details about identified discrepancies for a specific batch, including the nature of the mismatch.

batch_id.description: The ID of the batch to investigate (e.g., '88-B').

action_set_definitions.name: get_authorized_roster
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches the list of authorized individuals for a specific district to validate write-in votes.

action_set_definitions.name: get_batch_vote_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the raw text or data for the physical votes within a specific batch.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_normalization
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the normalized vote mapping for a batch. Maps raw write-in entries to authorized individuals or the 'Scatter' category based on SOP ADJ-04.

batch_id.description: The ID of the batch being resolved.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_precinct_certification
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the precinct status to 'Certified' and updates total confirmed votes once all deltas are eliminated.

reconciliation_confirmed.description: Must be true to proceed with certification.

state_description.precinct_records: A mapping of precinct IDs to their respective ballot counts, including physical count and machine-reported count.
state_description.identified_discrepancies: A list of specific errors or mismatches discovered during the audit process.
state_description.audit_trail: A log of all actions taken within the environment to resolve issues.
state_description.verification_status: The overall status of the resolution process (e.g., 'In Progress', 'Certified', 'Pending Audit').
state_description.total_confirmed_votes: The current tally of votes that have passed all discrepancy checks.

identified_discrepancies.details: Batch #88-B contains 45 physical write-in entries, but the scanner only recorded 42 marks. Manual adjudication against District 9 Certified Write-In Candidates (CWIC) filings is required.

audit_trail.notes: Tabulation complete for P_05. Write-in mismatch detected in Batch #88-B.
